title: malaxis distans
intro: Malaxis distans, also known as the distant orchid or green adder's tongue, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis distans include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves and roots are also used in herbal preparations to create infusions and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
